LAW AND MOTION, 302, PLAINTIFF RH INVESTMENT, INC.'S MOTION TO STAY ACTION PENDING ARBITRATION IS OFF CALENDAR WITHOUT PREJUDICE TO BEING REFILED. PLAINTIFF HAS NOT FILED A PROOF OF SERVICE AND ITS MOTION IS NOT FILED IN CONFORMITY TO THE NOTICE REQUIREMENTS OF CCP 1005. COUNSEL FOR PLAINTIFF IS REMINDED THAT THE LOCAL RULES REQUIRE DELIVERY OF COURTESY COPIES OF ALL FILED PAPERS TO DEPARTMENT 302. calendar.matters:
ORDER TO SHOW CAUSE
Off Calendar Jul-06-2017 Off Calendar

ORDER TO SHOW CAUSE
Off Calendar May-04-2017 Continued To Jul-25-17 At 10:30 A.M. In Dept 610

Notice Of Unopposed Motion And Unopposed Motion To Stay Action Pending Arbitration
Off Calendar May-02-2017 Off Calendar
MINI MINUTES:

No appearance on this matter. The Court adopted its tentative ruling.
Plaintiff RH Investment, Inc.'s motion to stay action pending arbitration is off calendar without prejudice to being refiled. Plaintiff has not filed a proof of service and its motion is not filed in conformity to the notice requirements of CCP 1005. Moreover, while plaintiff contends that the motion is unopposed, assuming that is correct, the proper procedure is to present a stipulated proposed order. Counsel for plaintiff is reminded that the Local Rules require delivery of courtesy copies of all filed papers to department 302. Judge: Harold Kahn; Clerk: Cynthia Herbert; Reporter: Carol Karen CSR #8189 =(302/HEK)

CASE MANAGEMENT CONFERENCE
Off Calendar Mar-17-2017 Set For Order To Show Cause On May-09-17 At 10:30 A.M. In Dept 610
